case_title: RICHARD DI BERNARDO VS. SAFEWAY INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DI BERNARDO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-01-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-22-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. WITNESSES PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SAFEWAY INC., JAMES JOHNSON AND ANTONIO SIAN. JPT ELIZABETH RILES. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DI BERNARDO, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
